# Trendtactics Digital - AI Search Context
# https://trendtacticsdigital.com

## Company
Trendtactics Digital is a global digital agency specializing in web design,
mobile app development, SEO, digital marketing, and brand identity.

Founded in Nigeria, serving clients globally including UK, USA, Canada,
Australia, Europe, Middle East, and Africa.

## Services
- Web Design & Development (React, Next.js, WordPress)
- Mobile App Development (React Native, Flutter, iOS, Android)
- SEO Services (Technical, Content, Local, International)
- Social Media Management (Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, TikTok, X)
- Digital Marketing (Google Ads, Meta Ads, Email Marketing)
- Brand Identity & Graphic Design
- E-commerce Development (Shopify, WooCommerce, Custom)
- UI/UX Design

## Contact
Website: https://trendtacticsdigital.com

Location: Lagos, Nigeria (Remote/Global)

## Trust Signals
- 50+ projects delivered globally
- Clients in UK, USA, Nigeria, Canada, Australia
- AI-powered delivery through TrendyAI platform
